title: OpenAMP Reviewer Questionnaire
description: Structured feedback schema for expert reviewers evaluating an external review packet. Enables machine-parseable review outcomes and supports honest, reproducible review workflows.

reviewer_id.description: Unique identifier for the reviewer (anonymised or named)

packet_id.description: The packet_id of the external review packet being reviewed

reviewed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the review was completed

scientific_validity.description: Rating of scientific validity of the pipeline and approach (1=poor, 5=excellent)

benchmark_adequacy.description: Rating of whether benchmarks adequately support the claims (1=inadequate, 5=fully adequate)

safety_concerns.description: Whether the reviewer identifies safety concerns with the packet or candidates

safety_concern_description.description: Detailed description of safety concerns (required if safety_concerns is true)

recommendation.description: Overall recommendation for the review packet

comments.description: Free-text comments and feedback from the reviewer

conflict_of_interest_declared.description: Whether the reviewer has declared any conflict of interest

conflict_of_interest_detail.description: Description of any conflict of interest (required if conflict_of_interest_declared is true)

other_expertise.description: Description of expertise if domain_expertise includes 'other'
